name: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind

issues.description: Effect completely misrepresents card ability. Card performs a deck search (SearchDeck) with filtering conditions, not a simple DrawCard. Missing: deck look mechanic, Egghead type condition, card name exclusion, hand addition, and bottom deck placement.
Action type should be 'SearchDeck' not 'DrawCard'. This is a tutoring effect, not raw card draw.
Missing conditions array. Must include type filter (Egghead) and exclusion condition for card name 'He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind'.

filter.excludeName: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind
